g.text: Monotonic vs Wall-Clock Time for Latency Measurement

div.p:
bpf_ktime_get_ns() returns nanoseconds since system boot. • Never goes backward (monotonic guarantee) • Ignores NTP adjustments
• Continues across suspend/resume (modern kernels) • Perfect for measuring deltas between events If you need wall-clock correlation, track the offset between monotonic and wall-clock time in userspace, then apply it when formatting timestamps.
